let w1: Set[G] satisfy { w0 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) and w1 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) and w1 != w0 and not w0.is_disjoint(w1) }
let w2: Set[G] satisfy { w0 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) and w2 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) and w2 != w0 and not w0.is_disjoint(w2) }
function(x0: Set[G], x1: Set[G]) { not x0 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) or not x1 ∈ finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s) or x0.is_disjoint(x1) or x0 = x1 }(w0, w2)
function[T0](x0: T0) { x0 ∈ Set.universal_set[T0] }[G](lib(functions).identity_fn(x))
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](x)
let w0: G satisfy { not w0 ∈ set_list_union[G](finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s)) }
function(x0: G) { x0 ∈ set_list_union[G](finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s)) }(w0)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 * k0 = x1 } = x0.divides(x1) }(s.order, G.order)
not exists(k0: Nat) { G.order = s.order * k0 }
function(x0: Nat) { s.order * x0 != G.order }(finite_left_coset_representatives[G](s).length)
